title: Recuria
description: VR headset modpack for Recuria project server.
body:
# Modpack for VR

**Join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/rRzaZS2pxB) to play!
**

### About the project:

Modpack includes vivecraft, optimization mods, better sound mods, emf, etf, create, farmer's delight and other miscellaneous mods.

This is a MODPACK for VR server in which
✅ VR headset required
❌ Non-VR players are not allowed

This project is fully non-profit and made by a VR player who was tired of the lack of truly active VR-dedicated servers. So… I built one! 

If you love Vanilla survival but want to experience it with full VR immersion this project is the place for you.

Suggestions are always welcome!

This project takes zero profit. Every donation goes toward server hosting and performance.
